title: QA/QC Engineer
description:
• Preparation of Method Statements, Inspection and Test Plan (ITP), Project Quality Plan (PQP), material submissions, inspection form and related documents
  • Conduct regular site inspections to ensure works are compliant with method statements (in accordance to BCA's Good Industry Practice & approval from the clients and consultants)
  • To plan, coordinate and execute quality assurance and quality control activities to ensure project outputs comply with contract specifications and standards
  • Work closely with site engineers and supervisors to ensure construction methods comply with CONQUAS specifications, providing guidance, rectifications and conducting relevant training on quality protocols as needed
  • Liaise and collaborate with suppliers / sub-contractors to ensure quality control
  • Monitor material status updates and maintain traceability records to support project scheduling and quality tracking
  • Identify and report non-conformance (NC), issue corrective action requests (CAR), and perform root cause analysis to recommend preventive measures
  • Perform checks on the structural, architectural and M&E materials/works to ensure that the final touch-up works are ready for inspection
  • Address client's defects during Defect Liability Period
  • Participate in internal and external quality audits to maintain compliance and continuous improvement
  • Arrange and liaise with BCA for CONQUAS/QM assessments. Act as the primary quality liaison with clients and consultants, updating them on QA/QC matters and addressing quality concerns directly related to CONQUAS scoring
  • Maintains safe, secure, and healthy work environment and aiming for zero accident
  • Ensure construction sites meet legal guidelines, and health and safety requirements
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as and when assigned


Requirements:

  • Diploma or bachelor's degree in civil engineering, construction management, or related field
  • Good knowledge of construction quality control/assurance principles
  • Familiarity with the LTA's M&W specifications
  • Candidates who possess 3-5 years of design and build experience in a QA/QC role within the building main contractor firm, with experience in managing Quality Marks assessment processess or certifications (such as Green Mark) will have an added advantage
  • Certifications: BCA-approved CONQUAS training or relevant quality certification such as ISO 9001:2015 in Quality Management Systems
  • Familiar in conducting quality audits and surveillances; and proficient in the concepts of construction productivity, sustainability and QAQC

postedCompany.description:
Our history sterted in 1988 where we were only a small earth moving contactor with a nominal fleet of lorries. Today, KTC has transformed to a multi discipline grade A1 civil engineering enterprise with interest in both Singapore and Indonesia

KTC core businesses are categorised as follows:

- Civil and inrastructure Engineering

- General and Speacialised Basement Excavation

- Building and Structural Construction

- Demolition

- Coal Mining & Trading

- Property Development

- Hospitality
postedCompany.name: KOK TONG CONSTRUCTION PTE LTD
